description: These dependencies are updated as part of updating the copier template
Track vendored runtime-support pattern libraries pinned in each
IOC instance's runtime-lock.yaml so Renovate raises a PR when a new
NOTE: after a bump CI / the maintainer MUST re-run
'ibek pattern update' to re-vendor the files and refresh the hashes
in runtime-lock.yaml (Renovate only edits the version string here).
